title: 1.1: Makes incFilesProcessed() conditional on successful processing in pkg/handlers/ar.go

1.7: Decouples panic recovery from the shared err variable in pkg/handlers/rpm.go by ensuring the panic handler does not reassign the outer err variable

1.8: Retains a measureLatencyAndHandleErrors(start, err) call in the HandleFile goroutine of all four handler files (pkg/handlers/ar.go, pkg/handlers/archive.go, pkg/handlers/default.go, pkg/handlers/rpm.go)
